case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. MIGUEL LINARES

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINARES, MIGUEL $15,038.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,038.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74843145)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74843145) AS TO DEFENDANT LINARES, MIGUEL
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST; WAIVER OF COSTS; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 74843145) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210073155), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. SERVED MAR-29-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-02-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT LINARES, MIGUEL
